item.title: Nancy Guthrie latest: Savannah Guthrie pleads with public, 'We need your help'
item.description: Savannah Guthrie's mother, Nancy, was reported missing Feb. 1.

item.title: Catherine O'Hara cause of death revealed
item.description: O'Hara's manager confirmed the news of her death on Jan. 30.

item.title: WATCH: How cities gave spotted lanternflies an evolutionary edge
item.description: Genetics reveal how the invasive insects adapted to urban heat and pesticides. NYU biology assistant professor Kristin Winchell and Ph.D. student Fall...

item.title: WATCH: Olympians warned to be careful with medals as athletes report broken ribbons
item.description: Officials at the Olympics say they’re giving “maximum attention” to reports that medals are snapping off of their ribbons just hours after they are aw...

item.title: WATCH: These moms are going for gold at the Winter Olympics
item.description: Team USA athletes Tabitha Peterson, Tara Peterson, Jasmine Jones, Elana Meyers Taylor and Kendall Coyne Schofield tell Maggie Rulli about how motherho...
